title: Way Too Realistic (WTR)
body: Way Too Realistic is a fabric 1.20.1 modpack that makes Minecraft, well, as realistic as I bothered to make it. I removed and added a lot of mods to make this as best as possible without being too hard or too easy. I tried this pack myself and died, a lot, but who knows? Maybe you can last longer is this Minecraft world full of colours, heat, cold, thirst, and hunger. Good luck out there!
